
[1;31m[COMMAND-LINE FORMAT ERROR][0m within stream 'STDIN Stream'
Details: 'charmap' codec can't encode characters in position 0-12: character maps to <undefined>

Tip: Ensure your formatting inputs perfectly map to your CSV column lengths!
--align:  l (left), c (center), r (right)                   | e.g., 'lrc'
--valign: t (top), m (middle), b (bottom)                   | e.g., 'tmb'
--dtype:  t (text), f (float), i (int), e (exp), a (auto)   | e.g., 'ttfi'
--col-widths: Comma-separated integers                      | e.g., '40,10,15'
